This translation captures the requirement that the robot should explain its actions when it deviates from the plan. It breaks down the requirement into several parts:

1.  When the robot's actions deviate from the planned route (decision1 & bool_exp1), it should:
2.  (decision2 & bool_exp2) the robot should provide reason.
3.  (decision3 & bool_exp3 & bool_exp4) The robot needs to provide an explanation.
